Hello All.  Jago and Max, please find your tickets to go to St. Thomas on Oct. 15th.  Carlos, Jeffrey’s driver will, pick you up from the airport and get you to his islands where you can take tours with one of Jeffrey’s island managers.  You will stay at the Ritz for the night of Oct. 16th.  You can coordinate with Jeffrey’s managers re your next days activities.  Below I am including everyones cell numbers.  Jago and Max, please double check these tickets for accuracy and confirm receipt.  You will be completely taken care of upon your arrival!

Jago: +39 3348415148
Max: 516-859-6357
Daphne (Island Manager): (340) 775-2525
Anna (Island Manager): (340) 642-2587
Karen (Island Manager): 340 626 3611
Brice (Island Manager): 340 201 9533
Carols (Driver): (340) 513-4309

Your Ritz confirmation will come in my next email to Jago and team only…Hope you have a super trip!
Thanks, Lesley
